title: Shell Profit Rises as Oil Volatility Boosts Trading Unit

Adjusted net income rose to $6.92 billion, the London-based company said in a statement. Bloomberg's Mitchell Ferman has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How an American City Can Become a Manufacturing Hub | Odd Lots
title_cn: 美国城市如何成为制造业中心 |零股
summary: The residents of Allentown are still sore about that Billy Joel song. And while it's true the Pennsylvania city became synonymous with deindustrialization after the steel industry began its decline in the 1970s,  it should be known for more: In the 1950s, some of the first mass-produced transistors were made in the city, the precursor of today's semiconductors. The city is a unique logistics and e-commerce hub — it's a day's drive from nearly 40 percent of the US population. In today's episode, recorded in Madrid at the Citylab conference, we speak to Mayor Matthew Tuerk about the city's grand strategy for building back and sustaining its manufacturing base, implementing industrial policy on a local level, how rezoning has changed in the last decade, the political puzzle of data centers, recruiting companies to come to Allentown, de-risking the American supply chain, and our favorite new category of industry — weight-gaining industries. (Source: Bloomberg)

The city is also a unique logistics and e-commerce hub — it’s a day’s drive from nearly 40 percent of the

summary: Farid Belbouab, Group CEO of global port and logistics operator Gulftainer, highlights how cargo is continuing to move through alternative corridors at a time when supply-chain resilience has become critical. He explains that Gulftainer is scaling from about 2,000 containers per week to 50,000. Belbouab speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, David Ingles and Yvonne Man give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Botched US Blacklist Highlights Frail Trump-Xi Truce
title_cn: 拙劣的美国黑名单凸显了特朗普与习近平休战的脆弱
summary: As President Trump prepares to meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, some long-standing tensions remain. Among them are the Pentagon's curbs on Chinese companies that could pose national security risks. Bloomberg's Kate O'Keeffe explains why this blacklist matters.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Two Indian Conglomerates to Plow $1 Billion in EV, Battery Tech
title_cn: 两家印度企业集团将斥资 10 亿美元发展电动汽车和电池技术
summary: Two Indian conglomerates are looking to spend nearly $1 billion to build domestic capabilities in electric-vehicle and battery technologies, people familiar with the matter said, reflecting a growing urgency on the part of the country’s biggest companies to reduce their reliance on Chinese technology.

title: Amazon Cuts Workers, Phases Out Grocery Service in Singapore
title_cn: 亚马逊裁员并逐步取消新加坡的杂货服务
summary: Amazon.com Inc. said a “small number of roles” in Singapore will be impacted as it phases out local fulfillment including Amazon Fresh in the city-state.

title: US & Iran Weigh Potential Deal to End War as Trump Seeks Offramp | Daybreak Europe 5/7/2026
title_cn: 特朗普寻求出口，美国和伊朗正在权衡结束战争的潜在协议黎明欧洲 5/7/2026
summary:
On today's show, the US and Iran are considering a fresh proposal to end the war, as the US President searches for an exit from the conflict. Donald Trump says Iran has agreed that it cannot have a nuclear weapon, though Iranian state media have signaled that parts of the US proposal are unrealistic.

Bloomberg understands that China has told its biggest banks to suspend new loans to five refiners sanctioned by the US - reversing guidance from just four days ago.

Plus the German maker of medical equipment, Siemens Healthineers, cuts its full-year comparable sales forecast, saying the weaker outlook reflects structural changes in China's diagnostics market, along with stronger inflation pressures.

Today's guest: Bernd Montag, Siemens Healthineers, CEO.

Correct: Video edited at 00;01;20 to reflect German factory orders in graphic.
Correct: Video edited at 00;39;19 to replace incorrect graphic. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech to Remain 'Resilient' to Higher Rates, JPM Says
title_cn: 摩根大通表示，科技行业将对利率上升保持“弹性”
summary: Fabio Bassi, head of cross-asset strategy at JPMorgan, discusses market sentiment as global equities rose on optimism that the US and Iran were nearing a deal. "The AI upstream theme is a critical diver of the dynamic of the equity market," Bassi tells Bloomberg Television. He adds that despite the oil supply shock in response to the situation in the Middle East, the message from earnings is still "positive."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GIC, BlackRock Funding Makes Skyroot India’s First Space Unicorn

title: Alibaba Shares Outpace Tencent’s as Chip Exposure Fuels Demand

title: AI Boom Trumps Sleep, Says Boss of Data Center Operator NEXTDC

title: Kimi Chatbot Maker Moonshot AI Valued at $20 Billion in Meituan-Led Round
title_cn: Kimi 聊天机器人制造商 Moonshot AI 在美团领投的一轮融资中估值达 200 亿美元
summary: Moonshot AI has raised about $2 billion in its latest funding round, signaling growing investor appetite for Chinese startups rivaling Silicon Valley’s leaders.

title: Top Trump Aide Says Administration Won’t Pick Winners in AI Race
title_cn: 特朗普高级助手表示政府不会选出人工智能竞赛的获胜者
summary: White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles said the US government would refrain from choosing winners and losers in artificial intelligence, the latest signal from a top aide to President Donald Trump as his administration prepares new AI policy directives.

title: Chinese Consumers Open Wallets as Malaise Lifted During Holidays

summary: Chinese households picked up their pace of spending over the recent Labor Day extended holiday weekend, according to preliminary figures economists are assessing for a turnaround from a disappointing March.

title: Korea Surpasses Canada as World’s Seventh-Largest Stock Market
title_cn: 韩国超越加拿大成为全球第七大股票市场
summary: South Korea’s equity market has overtaken Canada’s as the world’s seventh largest, propelled by insatiable demand for chips powering artificial intelligence.

title: Montage Tops CATL as Priciest Dual-Listed Stock After Chip Rally
title_cn: 芯片反弹后蒙太奇超越宁德时代成为最昂贵的双重上市股票
summary: Montage Technology Co. has overtaken Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. as the most expensive dual-listed stock in Hong Kong relative to its mainland shares, propelled by surging demand for AI chips.

title: EVs Next for Hong Kong Firm's Water-Soluble Battery Binder
title_cn: 香港公司的水溶性电池粘合剂将用于电动汽车
summary:
A water-soluble battery binder developed by Hong Kong-based GRST enables battery recycling with less pollution and greater recovery of critical metals, the company's chief strategy officer, Frank Harley, said in an interview at the BloombergNEF Summit New York on April 22, 2026. 

The firm "is making the first stage of recycling a lot simpler," Harley said.  Hong Kong-based GRST is "working with seven equipment manufacturers in China and the end customers for them are EVs, typically European EVs and consumer electronics," he said. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Is Making Its Claude Chatbot More Appealing to Consumers
title_cn: Anthropic 正在使其 Claude 聊天机器人对消费者更具吸引力
summary: Artificial intelligence startup Anthropic PBC, which originally aimed its Claude chatbot at businesses, is looking to capitalize on recent inroads with consumers by making the software more appealing to everyday people.

title: Anthropic Signs Computing Deal With SpaceX to Meet AI Demand
title_cn: Anthropic 与 SpaceX 签署计算协议以满足人工智能需求
summary: Anthropic PBC has signed an agreement with Elon Musk’s SpaceX to bolster computing resources and meet surging demand for its Claude artificial intelligence software.

title: Singapore Parliament Pledges No Jobless Growth in AI Era, CNA Reports
title_cn: 据 CNA 报道，新加坡议会承诺人工智能时代不会出现失业增长
summary: Singapore’s lawmakers unanimously passed a motion affirming that the country will not have jobless growth amid the artificial intelligence transition, CNA reported.

title: Day 3 From the Milken Institute Global Conference | The Close 5/6/2026
title_cn: 米尔肯研究所全球会议第三天 |收盘价 2026 年 5 月 6 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Eldridge CEO Tony Minella, JPMorgan Asset Management’s Jed Laskowitz, Charlesbank CEO Michael Choe, Match Group CEO Spencer Rascoff, Milwaukee Brewers Principal Owner Mark Attanasio, Bruin Capital CEO George Pyne, Former Wells Fargo CEO Tim Sloan, Tikehau Capital’s Mathieu Chabran, Partners Capital CEO Arjun Raghavan, Ellevest CEO Sylvia Kwan, Guggenheim Investments President Dina DiLorenzo, Barclays’ Brad Rogoff, Hunter Point CEO Avi Kalichstein, B Capital Co-CEO Raj Ganguly, & Warners Brothers Records CEO Aaron Bay-Schuck. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft in Talks to Ax Energy Pledge Amid Data Center Boom
title_cn: 微软正在就数据中心繁荣之际的 Axe 能源承诺进行谈判
summary: Microsoft Corp. is in discussions to shelve one of the industry’s most ambitious clean-energy targets as it tries to remove hurdles that could hold it back in the race to power data centers, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: AMD Soars After AI Demand Fuels Better-Than-Expected Outlook
title_cn: 人工智能需求推动前景好于预期，AMD 股价飙升
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc., the leading challenger to Nvidia Corp. in AI computing chips, reached a record high after a flood of data center spending bolstered its sales forecast.

title: DoorDash Shares Jump on Order Forecast That Tops Estimates
title_cn: DoorDash 股价因订单预测而上涨，高于预期
summary: DoorDash Inc. shares rallied after the delivery company gave a forecast for order value in the current period that topped analyst estimates, signaling healthy consumer demand for its services in the US and international markets.

title: NASA’s Chief on the Odds Aliens Have Already Found Earth
title_cn: 美国宇航局局长认为外星人已经发现地球
summary: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman sits down with Big Take Podcast guest host Tim Stenovec to talk the US-China moon race, vying with SpaceX for top talent and why there’s probably alien life out there. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How NASA’s Chief Plans to Bring Back the Moonwalk
title_cn: 美国宇航局局长计划如何恢复月球漫步
summary: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman sits down with Tim Stenovec to talk the US-China moon race, vying with SpaceX for top talent and navigating Capitol Hill. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm Warns of Phone Market Weakness, With AI Helping Offset Slump
title_cn: Arm 警告手机市场疲软，人工智能有助于抵消低迷
summary: Arm Holdings Plc warned of sluggishness in the smartphone industry, crimping a vital source of the chip company’s revenue, while promising that AI data center growth would more than offset the slump.

title: Snap Falls After Saying Advertising Revenue Buffeted by War
title_cn: 广告收入受到战争冲击后 Snap 股价下跌
summary: Snap Inc. declined in extended trading after noting that advertising revenue, a key part of its business, has been hampered by the war in the Middle East.

title: Fortinet Jumps on Outlook Hike, Billings Growth Spurt
title_cn: Fortinet 展望上调，比林斯增长突飞猛进
summary: Fortinet Inc. shares rose as much as 24% in post-market trading after the cybersecurity company raised its full-year revenue outlook above expectations, following its largest billings expansion in over three years.

title: Merz-Trump Rift Was a 'Misunderstanding,' Wadephul Says
title_cn: 瓦德菲尔表示，默兹与特朗普之间的裂痕是一场“误会”
summary: German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul discusses Chancellor Friedrich Merz's coalition's clash with US President Donald Trump. Last month Merz told an audience that the US is being “humiliated” by Iranian leaders. Trump responded by saying the German Chancellor shouldn't interfere, and should focus on ending Russia's war with Ukraine instead. Wadephul talks with Bloomberg News Editor-in-Chief John Micklethwait in Berlin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: German Top Diplomat Says Merz, Trump Have ‘Solid’ Relations
title_cn: 德国高级外交官称默茨与特朗普关系“牢固”
summary: Germany’s top diplomat said the tension between President Donald Trump and Chancellor Friedrich Merz was a misunderstanding — and that the government in Berlin supports the US aim to ensure Iran can’t obtain a nuclear weapon.

title: Israel Kills Hezbollah Elite Unit Head in Strike on Beirut
title_cn: 以色列在贝鲁特袭击中杀死真主党精锐部队负责人
summary: The Israeli army says it killed the commander of an elite Hezbollah unit in an attack in the southern suburbs of Beirut on Wednesday, the first in the vicinity of the Lebanese capital since a US-brokered ceasefire came into effect last month.

title: Zimbabwe to Return 67 Foreign-Owned Farms Seized in Land Grab
title_cn: 津巴布韦将归还在土地掠夺中查获的 67 个外资农场
summary: Zimbabwe said it was returning a number of foreign-owned farms that were seized during a violent land grab more than 25 years ago and pay compensation of $146 million.

title: President of Cobalt Giant Congo Weighs Third-Term Referendum
title_cn: 钴巨头刚果总统考虑举行第三次任期公投
summary: Democratic Republic of Congo President Felix Tshisekedi said he’s prepared to seek another five years in office if asked to do so after a referendum, highlighting a growing trend of term-limit evasion in Africa.

title: North Korea’s New Constitution Gives Kim Formal Power Over Nukes
title_cn: 朝鲜新宪法赋予金正恩掌控核武器的正式权力
summary: North Korea has amended its constitution to formally give leader Kim Jong Un sole authority over the country’s nuclear arsenal, according to South Korean lawmakers briefed by Seoul’s spy agency.

title: Ukraine Looks Beyond Summer Offensive to a Crucial Winter in the War
title_cn: 乌克兰将目光从夏季攻势转向战争中关键的冬季
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskiy is asking Western allies to speed up deliveries of air-defense systems and interceptor missiles to prepare for another winter of intense bombing that could prove to be the next critical moment in Kyiv’s battle to resist the Russian invasion.

title: Iran Weighs One-Page US Memorandum to End War
title_cn: 伊朗考虑签署一页美国备忘录以结束战争
summary: The US presented a one-page memorandum of understanding to Iran that would gradually reopen the Strait of Hormuz and lift the American blockade on Iranian ports, according to a person familiar with the measure. The move came after US President Donald Trump suspended a short-lived mission to offer safe passage for commercial ships through the waterway. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Urges Foreigners Leave Kyiv Over Victory Day Threat
title_cn: 俄罗斯敦促外国人因胜利日威胁离开基辅
summary: Russia told foreign governments and organizations to evacuate diplomatic staff and citizens from Kyiv, saying a retaliatory strike would be inevitable if Ukraine tried to attack Moscow during World War II Victory Day celebrations on May 9.

title: EU Fails to Finalize US Trade Deal, Risking New Tariffs on Cars
title_cn: 欧盟未能敲定美国贸易协议，面临对汽车征收新关税的风险
summary: The European Union failed to finalize a long-delayed US trade deal during overnight talks, despite warnings from President Donald Trump that he would soon impose fresh tariffs.

title: Missile Unveiled by Turkey Has a Range of 6,000 Kilometers
title_cn: 土耳其推出射程6000公里的导弹
summary: An intercontinental ballistic missile showcased by Turkey at an expo this week has a range of 6,000 kilometers (3,750 miles), putting much of Europe and the Middle East within reach. The Yildirimhan missile, named after an Ottoman sultan, marks progress toward joining the global military elite. Bloomberg's Onur Ant reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Senator Thanks China for Iran Efforts, Calls for Boeing Deal
title_cn: 美国参议员感谢中国为伊朗所做的努力，呼吁与波音达成协议
summary: Senator Steve Daines expressed his appreciation toward Beijing for encouraging Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the US searches for an off-ramp to a nine-week war that’s roiled global energy markets.

title: European Industry Is in Crosshairs of China’s New Five-Year Plan
title_cn: 欧洲工业成为中国新五年计划的瞄准目标
summary: For Europe, a new cycle of Chinese rivalry heralded by its latest roadmap for advancement is forcing soul searching on how to respond.

title: New Zealand Looks to Boost Navy Amid Escalating Global Tensions
title_cn: 在全球紧张局势升级之际，新西兰希望增强海军实力
summary: New Zealand is open to expanding its frigate fleet beyond its current two vessels, with Defence Minister Chris Penk saying “no options are off the table” as the government weighs buying new warships from Japan or the UK.

title: Crisis-Weary Southeast Asia Gathers Amid Iran War Energy Shock
title_cn: 疲惫不堪的东南亚在伊朗战争中聚集 能源冲击
summary: Southeast Asian leaders are gathering in the Philippines for an annual summit, seeking to bolster economic cooperation and shore up regional resilience as countries grapple with an energy shock tied to the US-led war in Iran.

title: US and Iran Weigh Potential Deal to End the War
title_cn: 美国和伊朗权衡结束战争的潜在协议
summary: The US and Iran are circling around a fresh proposal to end the war, as President Donald Trump searches for an exit from the Middle East conflict. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche has the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Taiwan Rebukes China After Report Firm Fired Minister’s Relative
title_cn: 报告公司解雇部长亲属后台湾谴责中国
summary: A company operating in China apparently fired the relative of a Taiwanese minister over backing for the island’s independence, according to Chinese state media — a move officials in Taipei condemned.

title: Bessent to Meet Takaichi, Katayama, Ueda in Japan Next Week
title_cn: 下周贝森特将在日本与高一、片山、上田会面
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent will spend three days in Japan starting Monday and is expected to meet senior officials including Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi before traveling to China, according to local media reports.

title: US, Iran Weigh Potential Deal as Trump Seeks Way Out of War
title_cn: 特朗普寻求摆脱战争之际，美国和伊朗正在权衡潜在协议
summary: The US and Iran were circling around a fresh proposal to end the war on Wednesday, as President Donald Trump searches for an exit from a conflict that has elevated energy prices and damaged his political standing.

title: FBI Raids Office of Virginia Democrat Who Pushed Redistricting
title_cn: 联邦调查局突袭推动重新划分选区的弗吉尼亚民主党办公室
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation executed search warrants Wednesday at the Virginia office of L. Louise Lucas, one of the state’s most powerful Democrats, according to a person familiar with the investigation.

title: Oil, Gas Plunge As Iran Weighs US Proposal to End War | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/06/2026
title_cn: 伊朗权衡美国结束战争的提议，石油和天然气价格暴跌权力平衡：最新版 05/06/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Jack Lew, former US Ambassador to Israel under President Joe Biden, says pushing Iran to "zero enrichment" would be a step beyond the 2015 nuclear deal, while emphasizing the need for strict monitoring and removal of enriched uranium. Marc Short, former Chief of Staff to Vice President Mike Pence and now Chairman of Advancing American Freedom, says heavy Republican spending against fellow GOP candidates could "demoralize" voters and backfire in November, as members grow increasingly fearful of crossing President Trump.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jeffrey Epstein’s Purported Suicide Note Released by US Court
title_cn: 美国法院公布了杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的自杀遗书
summary: A purported suicide note from Jeffrey Epstein, which his former cellmate said he discovered tucked in a book, was released by a federal judge on Wednesday.

title: Judge Says DOJ Can Keep Georgia Ballots Seized in Vote Probe
title_cn: 法官称司法部可以在投票调查中扣押佐治亚州选票
summary: The Trump administration can keep 2020 election ballots and other materials it seized in January from a Georgia county in connection with President Donald Trump’s unsubstantiated claims that voting was mired by fraud that led to his defeat, a federal judge ruled.

title: AI Super PACs Are Improperly Hiding Payments, FEC Complaint Says
title_cn: FEC 投诉称 AI 超级 PAC 不当隐藏付款
summary: A government ethics group has accused a pair of super political action committees backed by artificial intelligence investors of improperly concealing which companies they are paying to create advertisements and send messages to voters.

title: Marc Short Warns GOP Infighting Could Hurt in November
title_cn: 马克·肖特 (Marc Short) 警告共和党内讧可能会在 11 月造成伤害
summary: Marc Short, former Chief of Staff to Vice President Mike Pence and now Chairman of Advancing American Freedom, says heavy Republican spending against fellow GOP candidates could "demoralize" voters and backfire in November, as members grow increasingly fearful of crossing President Trump. He also warns rising gas prices and higher costs for farmers—including fertilizer and trade pressures tied to tariffs—could weigh on voters in Middle America and threaten Republican strength in traditionally safe districts. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran 'Zero Enrichment' Would Be Step Forward: Lew
title_cn: 卢：伊朗“零浓缩”将向前迈出一步
summary: Former Treasury Secretary under President Barack Obama and former US Ambassador to Israel under President Joe Biden, Jack Lew, says pushing Iran to "zero enrichment" would be a step beyond the 2015 nuclear deal, while emphasizing the need for strict monitoring and removal of enriched uranium. He warns the economic fallout from the conflict depends on how long the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, with prolonged disruption likely to fuel energy shocks and consumer stress. Lew also says recent market strength reflects underlying US economic resilience but cautions risks could build if the conflict drags on. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
